rationale: Review 2 identifies a real proof-quality improvement in `fiberHomeomorph`: the unrestricted `simp` is closing the subtype/fiber condition using default simp facts plus `map_proj`, and replacing it with `simp only [...]` would make the proof less brittle. The change is small, but it is grounded in the diff and improves the resulting PR more than Review 1's no-op approval.
